raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The artifact contains a direct internal contradiction: paragraph 1 asserts that 'rationale diversity at decode time, not model scale or additional supervision, is the principal lever,' while paragraph 4's ablations explicitly conclude the opposite—that distillation (additional supervision) is 'the principal driver of the reported gains' and that inference-time sampling 'leaves substantial accuracy on the table.' Logical consistency checking is central if any substantive review is expected.","R1.3":"The quantitative ablation results (distilled single-sample 61.8% > K=20 voting 60.4% on A-OKVQA; 48.1% vs 44.7% on CLEVRER; 70% improvement loss when distillation removed) directly contradict the thesis claim, making evidence-claim alignment a plausible load-bearing responsibility."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the review prioritize logical consistency and argument integrity (i.e., flag that the stated central thesis contradicts the paper's own ablation conclusions), or focus on writing and prose quality, or produce a high-level summary of the contribution?"}

rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains a direct internal contradiction: paragraph 1 asserts that 'rationale diversity at decode time, not model scale or additional supervision, is the principal lever,' while paragraph 4's ablations explicitly conclude the opposite—that distillation (additional supervision) is 'the principal driver of the reported gains' and that inference-time sampling 'leaves substantial accuracy on the table.' Logical consistency checking is central if any substantive review is expected.
rationale.R1.3: The quantitative ablation results (distilled single-sample 61.8% > K=20 voting 60.4% on A-OKVQA; 48.1% vs 44.7% on CLEVRER; 70% improvement loss when distillation removed) directly contradict the thesis claim, making evidence-claim alignment a plausible load-bearing responsibility.

parsed.clarification_question: Should the review prioritize logical consistency and argument integrity (i.e., flag that the stated central thesis contradicts the paper's own ablation conclusions), or focus on writing and prose quality, or produce a high-level summary of the contribution?
